rules.name: Verb Object Name
rules.intent: Make activity labels action-oriented and specific.
rules.forModellers: Name activities with a business verb followed by the object being acted on.
rules.forAI: Detect activity labels that do not start with a verb or that contain fewer than two words.

errorMessages.tooShort: Activity name should follow Verb + Object (at least two words)
errorMessages.missingVerb: Activity name should start with a business verb
errorMessages.default: Activity name should follow Verb + Object

rules.name: Discouraged Business Verbs
rules.intent: Avoid generic activity verbs that hide the real business action.
rules.forModellers: Replace vague leading verbs with a more specific business verb.
rules.forAI: Detect activity labels whose first word is on the discouraged generic verb list.

errorMessages.default: Activity label starts with a discouraged generic verb; prefer a more specific business verb

rules.name: Uncommon Abbreviations
rules.intent: Reduce ambiguity from obscure abbreviations in BPMN labels.
rules.forModellers: Avoid uncommon abbreviations in labels, or explain them with an annotation or glossary.
rules.forAI: Detect uppercase abbreviations that are not on the common acronym allow-list and ask for a clearer label or explanation.

errorMessages.default: Avoid uncommon abbreviations in labels or explain them via annotation/glossary
